owen's super cool awesome website

intro

hey, you found my website. welcome!

you may be wondering why all of the text on this site is in lowercase. some of that is rooted in my software engineering background where i was taught to use camelCase or snake_case. but i also just kind of like the way it looks. i want this site to be a comforting place and i think lowercase lettering conveys a sense of ease and relaxation.

anyways, on to the burning question you came to this wesbite for: who is owen stegall? that’s me!

all joking aside, i was born in statesville, north carolina in 2000 but i call conover, north carolina my home after i moved there in the summer of 2013. i graduated from newton-conover high school in 2018 and the university of north carolina at chapel hill in 2022. i entered the job market as a software engineer and worked in that field for nearly three years. however, i recently chose to transition into a legal career by pursuing a juris doctor at the university of south carolina where i expect to graduate from in 2028.

this website is meant to be a collection of information about me. so if you’re here to consider hiring me, you can check out my resume here. i’m also going to link to all of my old essays, law school notes, and code respositories here so i don’t have to store them on my desktop anymore

i also have a ton of new and ongoing hobbies, as well as thoughts on the books, shows, and movies i’m currently watching! i might use this site as a personal diary too, but i’ll see if that comes to fruition.

×
